description_long: This office building features a modern, rectangular design with two main wings connected by a central section elevated on columns. The facade is dominated by large, evenly spaced windows arranged in a grid pattern, giving the structure a clean and orderly appearance. The ground floor includes extensive glass storefronts, suggesting commercial spaces at street level, while upper floors are dedicated to office use. The building is primarily white with gray accents, and blue railings are visible on the balcony and around the elevated walkway. The structure is supported by several robust columns, particularly beneath the central section, creating an open passageway at ground level. The roof is flat and segmented, consistent with contemporary urban architecture.
description: A modern, multi-story office building with a white facade, grid-like windows, and commercial glass storefronts at street level. The structure features two main wings, a central elevated section on columns, and blue railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, commercial glass storefronts, and the two primary wings with grid-patterned windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat, segmented roof and the supporting columns beneath the central section, with minimal window detail.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the mirrored arrangement of the two wings, commercial spaces, and the central elevated section.
description_view_3: Side view revealing the open passageway beneath the central section, blue railings, and the symmetrical layout of the building's wings.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced rectangular windows in a grid pattern across all floors, with consistent vertical and horizontal alignment.
